name: Mushrooms & Chestnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick the shells of the chestnuts and place them in cold water. Bring to a boil.
2. Cook for 15 minutes, then drain and remove the shells.
3. Skin and quarter the chestnuts.
4. Heat the butter in a skillet and cook the mushrooms until lightly browned.
5. Blend in the flour, then slowly add the cream and seasoning.
6. Add the nuts to the mixture and heat thoroughly.
7. Garnish with chopped parsley.
8. Serve with hot bread or baked potatoes.
Yield: 3 to 4 servings.
